message:
fix(web): Correct VirtualizedOutput callback and add iframe URL validation

VirtualizedOutput Fix (VirtualizedOutput.tsx):
- OutputRow's onHeightChange callback now receives index as first param
- Previously, the closure captured a stale index reference
- New signature: onHeightChange(index: number, height: number)
- Passes index directly to component and through to callback
- Fixes incorrect row height tracking in virtualized list

Iframe Widget Security (WidgetRenderer.tsx):
- Adds protocol validation before rendering iframe
- Only allows http:// and https:// protocols
- Blocks javascript:, data:, and other potentially dangerous URIs
- Shows red error message when invalid protocol detected
- Prevents XSS attacks via malicious iframe src values

Both fixes improve correctness and security of the web dashboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
